name: Supplier Graph Schema — Critical Materials (Website-Sourced)
extraction_instructions:
EXCEL UPLOAD: This schema maps directly from the Critical Materials Suppliers Excel.
Column mappings: 'Company Name'→company_name, 'Country'→headquarters_location, 'Website'→website, 'Type'→type_description, 'Products'→products_raw, 'Capacity/Production Data'→company_description, 'Data Transparency Level'→data_transparency_level.

COMPUTED FIELDS (auto-inferred from Excel data):
supply_chain_tier: 1=Mine/Explorer/Developer/Producer, 2=Refiner/Smelter/Processor/Recycler, 3=Trader
industry_sector: inferred from products_raw column

BASE: BGS Supplier Graph Schema v1.0 rules apply for all base fields.

SOURCE: Company's own website (NOT the Excel, NOT third-party sources).

MAP TO BGS BASE FIELDS FIRST:
- company_name: Full legal name from website header/About page
- headquarters_location: From Contact Us/About page. 'City, Country'
- company_description: Company's own About text
- industry_sector: From primary commodity. Metals (Li, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, REE, etc.) → metals mining. Graphite, Silica, Ball Clay → industrial minerals. Bauxite/Alumina → construction minerals. Coal → coal.
- supply_chain_tier: 1=mine/primary producer. 2=refiner/smelter/processor/recycler. 3=trader/distributor. If both mining AND refining, use 1.
- manufacturing_sites: ONE entry per named mine/plant/refinery/smelter on the website. Each: {location:'Site Name, Country', country, site_type:'mine|refinery|smelter|processing plant', raw:'verbatim website text about this site'}
- products_offered: ONE entry per distinct product grade. Separate 'battery-grade lithium hydroxide' and 'technical-grade lithium carbonate' as different entries.
- sources: company website as tier2 source

EXTRAS FIELDS (capture if found on website — all marked extras:true):
- ticker_symbol + stock_exchange: from investor relations or homepage
- primary_commodities + by_product_commodities: from operations/products pages
- annual_production: specific tonnage figures with year from production reports
- jv_stakes: ownership percentages like 'Collahuasi (44%)'
- processing_capabilities: mining/processing methods mentioned
- certifications: Copper Mark, IRMA, ISO 14001, LME, etc.
- sustainability_report_url, annual_report_url, investor_relations_url: if linked

FIXED: is_verified=false, supplier_id=null, duns_number=null.
DO NOT INVENT. If not on the website, set null or [].

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: Full legal company name exactly as printed in source. Do not abbreviate.

fields.name: canonical_name
fields.description: Derived: lowercase, & → 'and', spaces → hyphens, remove punctuation. 'Tarmac Ltd' → 'tarmac-ltd'

fields.name: headquarters_location
fields.description: 'City, Country' format. e.g. 'Buxton, United Kingdom'. Null if not available.

fields.name: website
fields.description: Company website URL. Null in BGS DMQ — populated separately.

fields.name: company_description
fields.description: Brief description of the company. Null from BGS DMQ alone.

fields.name: industry_sector
fields.description: Based on primary commodity. See sector mapping in extraction_instructions.

fields.name: supply_chain_tier
fields.description: 1=mine/quarry/pit/peat/well (extraction). 2=handling/processing/recycling/smelting/refining. 3=trader/distributor.

fields.name: manufacturing_sites
fields.description: ONE entry per physical site. Each: {location: 'Site Name, Region/Country', country: 'Country name', site_type: 'mine|quarry|pit|oil well|gas well|brine well|handling site|wharf|processing plant|spoil heap|recycling facility|peat workings|exploration site|refinery|smelter|laboratory', raw: 'verbatim source text about this site including URLs, ownership %, production figures'}

fields.name: products_offered
fields.description: ONE entry per site per commodity per end-use. Each: {product_name, grade, product_id:'GridRef_CommodCode_Grade', category, source_url, datasheet_url:null, cross_graph_material_id:null}

fields.name: data_completeness_flags
fields.description: Fixed: {review_score:'manual_only', defect_rate_ppm:'manual_only', on_time_delivery_rate:'manual_only', pricing:'api_only', inventory_levels:'api_only'}

fields.name: sources
fields.description: BGS: [{source_name:'BGS Directory of Mines and Quarries 2020, 11th Edition', source_url:'https://www.bgs.ac.uk/mineralsuk/download/directory-of-mines-and-quarries-2020/', doi:null, tier:'tier1'}]

fields.name: ticker_symbol
fields.description: Stock exchange ticker if publicly listed. e.g. 'ALB', 'GLEN', 'LYC'.

fields.name: stock_exchange
fields.description: Primary stock exchange. e.g. 'NYSE', 'LSE', 'ASX', 'HKEx', 'TSX'.

fields.name: primary_commodities
fields.description: Main commodities produced. e.g. ['Lithium','Bromine']. From operations/products pages.

fields.name: by_product_commodities
fields.description: Secondary/by-product commodities. e.g. ['Gold','Silver','Sulfuric acid'].

fields.name: annual_production
fields.description: Production figures from most recent annual/quarterly report on the site. Each: {commodity:'Cobalt', volume:'36,100', unit:'tonnes', year:'2025', notes:'own sourced'}

fields.name: jv_stakes
fields.description: Joint venture ownership stakes. Each: {site_name:'Collahuasi', ownership_pct:44, jv_partners:['Anglo American'], country:'Chile', commodity:'Copper'}

fields.name: processing_capabilities
fields.description: Processing methods mentioned on the website. e.g. ['brine extraction','solar evaporation','direct lithium extraction','smelting','electrorefining']

fields.name: certifications
fields.description: Named certifications and standards. e.g. ['Copper Mark','IRMA','ISO 14001','LME responsible sourcing']

fields.name: data_transparency_level
fields.description: Research assessment of public data availability for this company.

fields.name: sustainability_report_url
fields.description: URL to latest sustainability/ESG report if linked from website.

fields.name: annual_report_url
fields.description: URL to latest annual report if linked from website.

fields.name: investor_relations_url
fields.description: URL to investor relations page.

fields.name: extras
fields.description: Catch-all array for structured data that doesn't fit any BGS base field. Each entry is a free-form object. Use this for: multiple office addresses (office_address_1, office_address_2...), contact details per region, licence numbers, specific JV ownership details per site, regulatory references, or any other structured data found on the website. Example: [{"office_address_1": "889 Harbourside Drive, Vancouver", "office_address_2": "82 Maude Street, Sandton"}]
